examples: Studies of caloric restriction are showing the way.
Those findings suggest that caloric restriction could delay ageing and increase longevity in humans, too.
By limiting food intake, caloric restriction minimizes the amount of glucose entering cells and decreases ATP generation.
This allows you to work harder overall and really increase the caloric burn of each workout.
If caloric restriction has such a huge benefit, couldn't we get it in an easier-to-swallow package?
